text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One night, as I'm patrolling the<n>tracks...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I see an Umamusume running silently<n>alone. I
can't seem to recall how long<n>she's been out
here, despite patrolling<n>the area for so long.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
choice_data_list: Do you always run so much?
Do you always run so much?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
choice_data_list: Do you always run so much?
Do you always run so much?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
There's someone I want to catch up<n>to... so I
have to keep running too.
choice_data_list: So you're chasing a goal, huh?
So you're chasing a goal, huh?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Night always falls while I'm running.<n>That's
why... I always run... this much.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She leaves the track without another<n>word. As I
watch her go, something<n>startling strikes me.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe was the only one<n>who left, but
I'm positive I heard more<n>than one set of
footsteps walking<n>away...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing that special... There's<n>just someone
always running ahead<n>of me, and I want to catch
up to her.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like her clear goal is what<n>drives her to
be so focused.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Are we done now? My friend has<n>left already,
so I should go too.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: As she leaves, something startling<n>strikes me.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe was the only one<n>who left, but
I'm positive I heard more<n>than one set of
footsteps walking<n>away...
